meta.title: Federal Internet Policymaking: A Discussion with Daniel Weit
meta.description: How is federal Internet policymaking similar to and different from more traditional approaches to regulatory policy? Hudson Institute hosted a discussion featuring Daniel Weitzner, the Deputy Chief Technology Officer in charge of Internet policy at the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy, who will explore this and other questions at an event hosted by Hudson Institute's Center for the Economics of the Internet.
